reed_source_role: commercial double chanter reed required before final tuning

reed_source_role: synthetic tenor drone reed required before reed-seat lock
pressure_dependency: High; starts and restarts must be measured against bag pressure before duplicating tenor

reed_source_role: synthetic bass drone reed required before bass slide lock
pressure_dependency: High; bass onset cutoff and drift must be measured after tenor stability

reed_source_role: no reed; pressure source and one-way valve only

Indirect pressure boundary; leaks invalidate reed onset and tuning rows
